def is_eligible_for_fitness_program(self) -> bool:
        return all([
            self.gender in [Gender.MALE, Gender.FEMALE, Gender.TRANSGENDER, Gender.NON_BINARY],
            self.age >= 18,
            self.race in [Race.ASIAN, Race.WHITE, Race.BLACK, Race.HISPANIC, Race.INDIAN],
            self.employment_status in [EmploymentStatus.EMPLOYED, EmploymentStatus.RETIRED],
            self.education in [Education.BACHELOR, Education.MASTER, Education.DOCTOR],
            self.marital_status in [MaritalStatus.SINGLE, MaritalStatus.MARRIED],
            self.religion in [Religion.CHRISTIANITY, Religion.ISLAM, Religion.HINDUISM, Religion.BUDDHISM],
            self.physical_activity_level == PhysicalActivityLevel.MODERATE
        ])
